title: Interstellar
tmdbOverview: The adventures of a group of explorers who make use of a newly discovered wormhole to surpass the limitations on human space travel and conquer the vast distances involved in an interstellar voyage.
synopsis: Released in 2014, Interstellar is a adventure, drama and science fiction film from United States and United Kingdom. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.7 on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
